title: Kayne Coulter
compiled_truth: Kayne Coulter is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-26 to 2002-01-31), Kayne Coulter sent 110 and received 582 emails, totalling 692 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (100), [Juan Hernandez](people/juan-hernandez) (96), [Dean Laurent](people/dean-laurent) (92), [John Kinser](people/john-kinser) (88), [Miguel Garcia](people/miguel-garcia) (84). Mailbox folders observed: 24_hr_power, enron_power, inbox, power, trading_info, ubsw_energy.
